videos.headline: Quinn Ewers throws 5 TDs in dominant win
videos.description: Quinn Ewers throws five touchdowns, including four in the first half, leading Texas to a big win over Florida.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Quinn Ewers throws 5 TDs in dominant win) 2024/11/09 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Quinn Ewers finds a wide open Matthew Golden for a TD
videos.description: Texas gets on the board first as Quinn Ewers lofts a pass to an open Matthew Golden for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinn Ewers finds a wide open Matthew Golden for a TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas gets great field position after a Florida fumble
videos.description: Texas forces the turnover as they knock the ball loose for a fumble and return it into the red zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas gets great field position after a Florida fumble) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunnar Helm finds himself open for a 22-yard TD
videos.description: Quinn Ewers throws it over the middle to an open Gunnar Helm for a 22-yard Texas touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunnar Helm finds himself open for a 22-yard TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quintrevion Wisner goes 50 yards on a screen pass for a Texas TD
videos.description: Texas goes up 21-0 as Quintrevion Wisner takes a screen pass 50 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quintrevion Wisner goes 50 yards on a screen pass for a Texas TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ewers goes long to Golden for a 32-yard TD
videos.description: Texas goes up 28-0 before halftime as Quinn Ewers finds Matthew Golden in the end zone for a 32-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ewers goes long to Golden for a 32-yard TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas' Ty'Anthony Smith snags an INT
videos.description: Texas gets a turnover before halftime as Ty'Anthony Smith snags it off the deflection.

videos.headline: Billy Napier not happy after Florida goes down 35-0
videos.description: Texas' Jaydon Blue scores a touchdown to go up 35-0, and Florida coach Billy Napier is not happy on the sideline.

videos.headline: Texas starts the second half with an INT
